title: Not Enough Trials Mod Integrations
description: Integrates various mods with Not Enough Trials
body:
# **This is an integration addon for Not Enough Trials
** This project contains various mods that add mod integrations to Not Enough Trials ## **Create X Not Enough Trials**
Spoiler This mod adds various features from Create including: **Chambers** Circuit * Fight on and get knocked around by the big spinning platform, and use launchers to send yourself across the chamber * Normal spawners: zombie variants, vindicators, spiders, phantoms * Tough spawner: blazes Hydraulic * Manipulate rising and falling platforms to lift yourself up or crush opponents * Normal spawners: skeleton variants, phantoms * Tough spawner: ranged wither skeletons **Loot** Valuables vault: 12-16 zinc ingots Ominous vault: 2 zinc blocks, potato cannon (enchanted levels 20-25) …and various decoration additions to the whole structure
## **The Twilight Forest X Not Enough Trials**
Spoiler This mod adds various features from Twilight Forest including: **Chambers** Enclosure * Filled with antibuilders preventing you from breaking the pots scattered throughout the chambers * Figure out how to break the antibuilders to progress and get an advantage over mobs * Normal spawners: skeleton druids, slime bettles, ice cores, skeleton variants * Tough spawner: king spiders Dissipate * Interact with castle doors to open passages, reveal traps and destroy bridges * Normal spawners: fire beetles, blockchain goblins, minotaurs, zoglins * Tough spawner: goblin knights **Spawners** Skeleton druids: becomes a baby and rides a spider when ominous. Can be found in corridors, ledge, crawl, cargo, hydraulic Fire beetles: spawns more and can spawn with pinch beetles when ominous. Can be found in corridors, cubic, ladder, relay Slime beetles: spawns more and can spawn with pinch beetles when ominous. Can be found in corridors, pedestal, assembly, relay Blockchain goblins: becomes faster, stronger and gains higher knockback when ominous. Can be found in chasm, circuit Minotaurs: gains health, speed and a diamond minotaur axe when ominous. Can be found in eruption, steak and ballista King spiders: spawns with a skeleton druid riding them. More spawn at once when ominous. Goblin knights: spawns with both the upper and lowers halves, its armor and its shield. Gains more health, speed and attack damage when ominous. **Loot** Valuables vault: 6-8 ironwood ingots Weapons vault: ironwood axe (sharpness 1-2, fortune 1), 4-6 ice bombs Armor vault: ironwood armor (with their respective built in enchants), charm of life or keeping, travellers gear with 2 preset updates Ominous vault: ironwood block, 6-8 knightmetal ingots, steeleaf and naga armor (10-15 level enchantments + built in enchants), steeleaf axe (efficiency 2), knightmetal axe (sharpness 1-2, unbreaking 0-2, efficiency 2), ice or ender bow (enchanted levels 20-25), charm of keeping 2 Spawner food: stingberries Wall dispensers: ice bombs Supplies barrels: travellers belt …and various decoration additions to the whole structure, mostly including banisters and drying racks
## **Supplementaries X Not Enough Trials**
Spoiler This mod adds various features from Supplementaries including: **Chambers** Ballista * Use bellows to blow mobs into bamboo spike pits * Climb across the ropes to reach the cannon and shoot down mobs * Normal spawners: pillagers, slimes * Tough spawner: plunderer **Loot** Weapons vault: 4-6 bombs Wall dispensers: Bombs Supplies barrels: Quiver …and various decoration additions to the whole structure, including launchers, candles and cannons
## **Quark X Not Enough Trials**
Spoiler This mod adds various features from Quark including: **Chambers** Relay * Strategically shift the gravisand walls up and down by activating ender watchers * Normal spawners: foxhounds, zoglins * Tough spawner: forgotten **Spawners** Foxhounds: become blue and stronger when ominous. Can be found in corridors, cubic, assembly, cargo Forgotten: holds a sharpness 1 iron sword and power 1 bow, becomes sharpness 2 and power 2 along with higher health when ominous **Loot** Ominous vault: All enchanted books have a chance to eject a tome version of itself instead Secret barrels: 50% chance for a rune template Ceiling dispensers: resilience potions …and various decoration additions to the whole structure, mostly including vertical slabs
## **Vanilla Backport X Not Enough Trials** This mod adds compatibility with Vanilla Backport to backport 1.21.4+ features, including the streak chamber. ## **Not Enough Trials Miscellaneous Compat**
Spoiler This mod adds loot and small additions from various mods including: [**Waystones**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waystones) [**Openblocks Elevator**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/openblocks-elevator) **(replaces the water elevators!)** [**Target Dummy**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mmmmmmmmmmmm) [**The Aether**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether) [**Ars Nouveau**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau) [**Farmer's Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) [**Iron's Spellbooks**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) **(replaces the built-in trial chambers loot additions)** [**Mekanism**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism) [**Mowzie's Mobs**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs) [**Caverns & Chasms**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/caverns-and-chasms) **(integrates its trial chambers changes)** All vaults will also be given a "magic" pool that ejects magic mod related items after the normal loot. Currently only Ars Nouveau and Iron's Spellbooks has loot in this pool.
